overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in an orange jacket walking and running along a sidewalk beneath massive elevated highway structures. The scene transitions from shadowed underpass areas to sunlit walkways, passing by the Arasaka corporate building with its distinctive neon signage, before continuing into darker tunnel-like spaces beneath the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to open sidewalk under elevated highway

events.description: emerging from deep shadow under overpass into bright direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the highway overpass, moving from shadow into sunlight

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support pillars
multi-level highway structure casting shadows on the walkway
metal safety barrier separating sidewalk from street level
tall cyberpunk-style skyscrapers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a shadowed area beneath a massive concrete highway overpass. As the character walks forward, they emerge into bright morning sunlight that illuminates the sidewalk. The elevated highway structure dominates the left side while futuristic skyscrapers are visible in the distance to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway sidewalk with industrial fencing and corporate district backdrop

events.description: character transitions from walking to running along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: jogging along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, moving toward the distant corporate buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction along the fence line

entered.detail: tall black metal fence running parallel to the walkway
large industrial structure with vertical paneling and scaffolding
massive skyscraper with reflective glass facade rising above the highway

segments.scene_description: The character moves from walking to running along the sunlit sidewalk beneath the elevated highway. A tall metal fence lines the left side with an industrial building behind it, while vehicles pass by on the right. In the distance, a massive corporate tower rises above the highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate building entrance with security barriers and illuminated signage

events.description: approaching the Arasaka corporate building entrance with prominent illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: walking past the Arasaka building entrance, observing the security barriers and neon signage

entered.detail: black corporate building facade with large illuminated Arasaka logo and branding
security checkpoint with glowing white Arasaka signage and red neon barrier lights
red illuminated barriers with road closed warnings in front of the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the Arasaka corporate building entrance, marked by distinctive black architecture and bright illuminated signage. Red neon security barriers glow in front of the entrance. A pedestrian in a hat walks toward the camera as it moves past the corporate facility.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass beneath highway interchange with concrete pillars

events.description: entering deep shadow under the highway overpass with significantly reduced visibility

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the shadowed underpass area beneath the highway structure

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking into a darker, more enclosed section of the underpass. The Arasaka building disappears behind as the concrete highway structure dominates overhead, casting deep shadows over the walkway. The environment becomes increasingly industrial and dimly lit as the character progresses toward the distant tunnel opening.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a city underpass that shifts from deep shadow into bright morning light before returning to a dim industrial gloom. It begins in the darkness beneath a massive concrete highway overpass, moving forward as the character emerges into brilliant sunlight that reveals futuristic skyscrapers in the distance. As the character accelerates into a run, the scene opens up along a sunlit sidewalk lined by a metal fence and passing vehicles, leading toward a towering corporate monolith. The camera then passes the Arasaka corporate building, characterized by its black architecture and glowing red neon security barriers, before the environment shifts once more. Finally, the light fades as the character enters a more enclosed section of the underpass, where the overhead concrete structure casts deep shadows over the walkway toward a distant tunnel opening.
